bodyHTML:
コーディング環境:
React@emotion/styled

animation-1pbsop4.cssText: transform-origin: left bottom; transform: translateY(0%) rotate(0deg);
transform-origin: left bottom; transform: translateY(101%) rotate(20deg);

animation-li5i0y.cssText: transform-origin: left bottom; transform: translateY(-101%) rotate(-30deg);
transform-origin: left bottom; transform: translateY(0%) rotate(0deg);

animation-3fj23j.cssText: transform-origin: right bottom; transform: translateY(0%) rotate(0deg);
transform-origin: right bottom; transform: translateY(101%) rotate(-20deg);

animation-1lwww8t.cssText: transform-origin: right bottom; transform: translateY(-101%) rotate(30deg);
transform-origin: right bottom; transform: translateY(0%) rotate(0deg);

animation-1guqo4c.cssText: transform: translateY(300px) rotate(20deg); transform-origin: left bottom;

styles.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgb(245, 245, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
